description: Concrete executable write-only tasks for the directed tool-use benchmark. These tasks assume the evaluator has already narrowed the fix surface and are meant to measure patch quality, scope control, and targeted verification.

tasks.goal: Patch the known ripgrep ignore-handling surface with a minimal change and verify the exact regression.
Patch the known uuid formatting and bitmask surface in one file and verify with the task test command.
Patch the known router/path counting surface across the three named files and verify with the task test command.
Patch the known semver comparison surface in src/eval.rs and verify with the task test command.
